summary: Home page redesign UI testing for The Program app. All 12 acceptance criteria verified via Playwright automation with authenticated user (user_a@theprogram.app). App loaded correctly, home screen renders all new layout elements as expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Home page redesign is fully complete and working. All acceptance criteria pass. Auth works via /auth → Sign in → email/password. Dashboard loads with profile data for user_a@theprogram.app.

test_results.no_floating_fab: PASS - tab bar Log button is styled with + but is NOT a floating FAB
test_results.quick_actions_4_in_row: PASS - Log Session, Coach, Check-In, Change Log all visible in single row
test_results.todays_session_card_prominent: PASS - Block Pull card shows at top after header
test_results.coach_directive_condensed: PASS - 2 sentence preview with 'Read more →' link
test_results.no_deload_pill: PASS - pill shows RECOVERY (not DELOAD), alert shows RECOVERY WEEK RECOMMENDED
test_results.alerts_conditional: PASS - PRE-SESSION CHECK-IN and RECOVERY WEEK RECOMMENDED alerts shown
test_results.block_compact_line: PASS - Block 1 of 7 · Rebuild/Recomp/Movement Quality · Intro Phase
test_results.weekly_review_conditional: PASS - WEEK 1 REVIEW shows because data exists
